outcomes.P2: Lifecycle node emphasis (done grayscale, future dashed-outline, active full) structure-only; calendar recede timeline-only.
outcomes.P3: Now-frontier emerald ready-ring on actionable-now epics (full-graph, cycle-suppressed). Legend frontier-row.
outcomes.P4: Optional lifecycle collapse rails in structure mode (Hide done/Hide future, DEFAULT OFF = show everything per user decision). Lifecycle partition. Calendar partitionEpics stays timeline-only. 269 web tests.

user_decision: Default structure view SHOWS EVERYTHING (full topology; done grayed/left, active full+ready-ring, future outlined/right). Hide-done/Hide-future are opt-in focus toggles, default off. Chose 'Show everything' over the vision's 'collapse by default'.
